mapper.update: update DGN_INSTRUCTIONS set TREE_NAME = #{treeNameNew,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{treeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update DGN_INSTRUCTIONS set content = #{content} where id = #{treeId}
mapper.select: select CONTENT from DGN_INSTRUCTIONS where id='${treeId}'
select TREE_TYPE from DGN_INSTRUCTIONS where id='${treeId}'
select tree_name as text,tree_type as icon,id ,parent_id as parentId from DGN_INSTRUCTIONS where parent_id='root'
select tree_name as text,tree_type as icon,id ,parent_id as parentId from DGN_INSTRUCTIONS where parent_id is not null and parent_id != 'root'
select max(id) from DGN_INSTRUCTIONS where parent_id =#{parentId}
